attacking_style: Not a natural attacker; gains positions through opportunistic breakaway survival on moderate climbs rather than explosive attacks. Shows resilience in fragmented race situations but lacks punch to initiate moves.
team_tactics: Operates with minimal mountain support from Intermarché, forced to defend independently at back of GC groups. Team not structured for sustained GC defense, leading to survival-mode racing once in red jersey.
terrain_preference: Survives best on category-2 climbs and moderate mountain stages where breakaway positioning compensates for limited climbing firepower. Exposed on sustained Cat-1 finishes and multi-climb mountain stages requiring repeated accelerations.
vulnerability: Crumbles under sustained GC pressure on hard mountain stages; crashes on technical descents when defending jersey under stress. Lacks team support to control race tempo when holding leader position.
key_patterns: Gained red jersey opportunistically from break, then entered pure survival mode (4 observations).
Consistently lost time to true GC contenders on harder mountain stages (3 observations).
Defended alone at back of GC groups without meaningful team support (3 observations).
Rival teams intentionally allowed jersey to burden under-resourced Intermarché squad (2 observations).
Showed fighting spirit after setbacks but ultimately vulnerable when defending leader position (2 observations).
form_trajectory: negative: Crashed out spectacularly on descent while defending red jersey under mounting pressure, confirming inability to sustain unexpected GC defense role
